sections.title: If the player is not disguised

lines.speaker: Natalidae Shadum
lines.text: Human! Get back to the slave pens before I call the guards!

lines.speaker: Natalidae Shadum
lines.text: Hey there. Have you seen Frank?

lines.speaker: Natalidae Shadum
lines.text: Yes, Frank. He's my pet bloodveld. He runs off a lot so I was wondering if you'd seen him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Frank doesn't seem like a very fitting name for a bloodveld.

lines.speaker: Natalidae Shadum
lines.text: Oh, he was named after my last pet. That one wasn't a bloodveld though, that one was a human.

lines.speaker: Natalidae Shadum
lines.text: Yes! A pet human called Frank.

lines.speaker: Natalidae Shadum
lines.text: Frank was great. He died though. Mother said it was my fault, that I didn't feed him properly. I'm not allowed pet humans now.

lines.speaker: Natalidae Shadum
lines.text: It's okay though. Now I have Frank the bloodveld. He's great. I don't need to feed him. He feeds himself.
